description: Bonifacio Caput, a factory maintenance worker, was brought to the occupational health clinic after exhibiting disorganized behavior, agitation, and hallucinations following a recent chemical exposure incident. As the occupational health and safety technician coordinating with psychiatric services, complete the psychiatric crisis evaluation and management plan in GNU Health. The plan must document an acute psychotic disorder diagnosis (ICD-10 F23), a clinical evaluation with vital signs reflecting his agitated state, an antipsychotic medication prescription, two baseline laboratory tests for psychotropic monitoring (e.g., CBC, metabolic panel, glucose, or lipids), and a scheduled follow-up appointment for 5-14 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
